hero_subheads: Designed for restaurant managers managing 10-30 shifts weekly.
Eliminate staff dissatisfaction with easy shift swaps.
Visualize your schedule at a glance.
Create a happier workplace with simple tracking.
value_props: Tailored for restaurant managers handling multiple shifts.
Enhance team satisfaction with straightforward scheduling.
Quickly manage shift swaps without confusion.
feature_bullets: Request shift swaps easily with a simple system.
View your entire scheduling at a glance with a visual calendar.
Receive instant alerts for any schedule changes.
Manual entry allows for personalized adjustments.
Keep your team connected and informed.
cta_variants: Join us for better shift management.
